reviews.review_description: This game had potential, and it was created by a Gtag YouTuber. But the game has no updates anymore. Idk if their team is just lazy, or they have better stuff to do. But it sure has been almost two years yet. No updates, no multiplayer. Just remember that these people have lives too, and better stuff to do.

When I played this game, it was really confusing. I thought it was an online game and you can’t go anywhere don’t even saw this game is popular for the secret animation of the monster do not get and when I was getting it, I thought it was gonna be fun￼ but I was wrong.
This game ia no fun please bring back to old apes if you want player count to go up no one plays this anymore
The game has nothing to do except pure silence and it’s not even online like bro yo it’s not fun

This game has been around for almost a year at this point and what do we have... NOTHING! It's just been a long time of silence and nothing being added to this game. I wouldn't recommend recommend ever getting it. It even had support from many people and had tons of potential, but nothing they just abandoned it and I doubt we'll ever see anything of it again, BUT I hope im wrong and the devs FINALLY add something after all this time of wait.

I was so excited for this game to come out! They said “its just 3 more months and it will come out on christmas!” So I waited… and waited… and finally it was christmas. They told us that there was an issue with meta, and that they could not release the game right at the moment.

 It should have taken 2 weeks for them to fix the problem. And here we are: its been 1 and a half year, nothing changed and nothing will.

 I admit that its hard to put multiplayer in the game before they maje the singleplayer, but who does that if they want a multiplayer fangame??? I also bought the size changer perpexedly, hoping the game eill come out soon. Turns out, it was just a waste if money. 

Im so disappointed.
I downloaded this game 2025 December 1 but all you do is walk around no monster no nothing ￣\_(ツ)_/￣

Sorry to the believers but he made a post on meta that says it'll be released on Christmas (of that year) that was 2024 I don't hate this game. I love it! I'm even digging for ways to find a source code but it's time to admit defeat. He doesn't care about it anymore

GROW UP. this game is under construction. You think they’re going to have EVERYTHING?!?! THEY’RE NOT. IT’S GOING TO TAKE A WHILE FOR MORE STUFF TO COME OUT. JUST GET OVER IT AND TURN THOSE 1 STARS INTO 5 OR 4 STARS YOU HATERS!!!
this game is honestly good but i would like the version before this one to come back
Haha

It’s a good game in all but where do I go? Also this game needs multiplayer. me and my friends were looking for it for hours. and couldn’t find us so I’m guessing they don’t have it has Good potential tho.

reviews.review_description: This game has potential if it actually had something scary in it besides the mirror jumpscare and there’s no were to go and u can’t progress I need instructions  rn it’s a terrible game

Only rating 5 stars so this can be more visible. Sure the game looks fun and the mirror trick is clever but i had absolutely no clue on where to go and I didn’t know how to go in a multiplayer lobby to play with my friends. So basically the mirror jumpscare is really all there is to this game (yet).
Its a great game and you could not make one better anyways
The only reason I’m rating this high is because one dude said grow up BUDDY ITS BEEN A WHOLE YEAR OF WAITING

Why owner why!
The game isn’t out I don’t think it ever gonna be released because I been waiting since it came out on the store
I installed this game today and thought it looked really good and scary, but I wandered around for like 20 minutes and there were 0 monster or instructions.

So basically, when I first started I had no idea what to do so when I got to the mirror and got jumpscared I went into the place with the zip lines but there was no instructions on where to go so I was wondering around trying to find out where I had to go so when I gave up I un-installed the game. And then a few months later I re-installed and the same thing happened so I had to uninstall again. I gave up and now I’ve seen you’ve revamped the game, I want to ask if you’ve added instructions on where to go at the start please. If you see this and you haven’t then add it ASAP
So scary also so fun
I will give it a 5 star review if it finally releases

It's a cool game but it hasn't been updated in a while because of meta's issues which I don't understand? Still waiting for multiplayer update and horror. Also I've never seen a game that actually looks good on quest 2 other than Arkham, but when the water turned red I was legit disturbed.

developer_response.body: There seems as there have been a connection issue while purchasing, since no one ever had that issue before, from countless players buying these items and having no issues with them, maybe try to see if you bought this on another meta account? Have you refunded it?

reviews.review_description: This game is kinda ok but the owners… the owners are continuing to use models although the original creator of the models told them to stop using the models and then they keep using it, the owners also say ALOT of bad things to the community, don’t play this game

developer_response.body: No we don't, the modeler made the cosmetics models FOR US, therefore they are the property of the game. The modeler was banned after he broke the rules many times and told us to stop using the models out of Spite. Please research the situation before making a review like this, cheers. PS, we are super kind to our community, we just take rule breaking and bans seriously to keep it a safe environment for everyone!

developer_response.body:
Woha, chill out there for a second
What didn't you like about APES that much? We will try to see what we can do about it.

reviews.review_description: I can't install anything else I can't delete it. thanks for ruining my headset

developer_response.body: Hello, This issue has appeared in many devices over a spam of many games, not just fan games, we recommend you talk to support about the manner, APES is not the cause of this, our game cant ruin your headset, It's a common bug that is happening in many games and it's out of our control to fix.

developer_response.body: We are redoing the maps of the game in hope to not feel rushed, we came up with the idea of a massive virtual cave that would have the entire game in it with better visuals, more to do and a LOT more. We hope that you can give our game a second chance once that update is out.
